primary.name: Teal
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, links, highlights

layout.container: container mx-auto px-4 md:px-6 lg:px-8 max-w-7xl

grid.product_grid: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full border-b bg-white/95 backdrop-blur supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-white/60

hero.content: Full width image with overlay text and CTA button

product_card.style: group relative bg-white border rounded-lg overflow-hidden hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300
product_card.actions: Quick view and Add to Cart visible on hover

visual_enhancers.gradients: None (Flat style preferred for this theme)

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Teal' theme by overriding the primary color in tailwind.config.js or using arbitrary values if needed, but consistency is key.
Use 'Open Sans' for all text. Import it from Google Fonts in index.css.
Follow the 'Bootstrap' grid feel using Tailwind's grid system (12 columns concept).
Ensure the Header has a 'Mega Menu' feel - use Shadcn Navigation Menu.
The Footer must be dark (#2D353C) with white text, matching the ColorAdmin theme.
Use the provided image URLs for the initial seed data/display.
Maintain a clean, white-space heavy layout within the containers.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use generic AI emojis.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states.
Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
Respect the 'Teal' constraint strictly for primary actions.
